title: What's New With VISs | Vaccines & Immunizations | CDC
text:
itions may be used until exhausted.
August 6, 2021 
Updated VISs Now Available 
Updated VISs for DTaP (diphtheria, tetanus, and pertussis) , Hib ( Haemophilus influenzae type b) , HPV (human papillomavirus) , live attenuated influenza , inactivated influenza , MMR , MMRV , meningococcal ACWY , meningococcal B , PCV (pneumococcal conjugate) , polio , Tdap (tetanus, diphtheria, and pertussis) , Td (tetanus and diphtheria), and varicella vaccines have been posted. We encourage providers to begin using these updated VISs immediately, but stocks of the previous editions may be used until exhausted.
